name: Carbide
description: Carbide — Information security compliance platform guiding startups through SOC 2 with automated policy and evidence tooling.

seo.title: Carbide — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Carbide: Carbide — Information security compliance platform guiding startups through SOC 2 with automated policy and evidence tooling.

when_to_use: SOC 2 Type II readiness for early-stage B2B SaaS
Automated policy generation for ISO 27001 certification
Security questionnaire response automation for sales deals
Employee security training tracking for compliance audits
Vendor risk assessment integrated with compliance evidence

pros: Training modules built into the platform for staff
Policy library tuned for SaaS SOC 2 scope
Virtual CISO add-on for teams without security leadership
cons: Integration breadth lags Vanta, Drata, Secureframe
Fewer framework options beyond SOC 2 and ISO 27001
Brand recognition lower when buyers ask which tool
review.verdict: A budget-conscious compliance starter for small teams, outpaced by bigger platforms as you scale.
review.best_for: Seed-stage SaaS targeting a first SOC 2 on a tight budget
review.not_for: Growth-stage companies needing deep integrations and multi-framework scope

lock_in.reason: Proprietary compliance SaaS with exportable evidence

transparency.reason: Subscription but tiers mostly on request
